title: P0: PlaceBlock actions time out — no completion event from adapter
description:
## Evidence
Agent log 2026-06-29 22:24:22 — multiple `place TIMED OUT after 8.3s — no result event received`. Adapter receives the place command via WebSocket but no `actionCompleted` or `error` event is sent back. The C# correlation tracker never sees a resolution.

Same pattern observed for GetStatus actions: `GetStatus TIMED OUT after 10.4s — no result event received`.

## Root Cause Hypothesis
The vec3.js fix (TSK-0262, commit b48fd44) or WS auth gate (TSK-0264) may have changed behavior. The `botPos is not defined` error was fixed (commit aa4af10), but the adapter may still have issues with the place action flow after the vec3 change.

## Impact
- Building is completely non-functional — every place action times out
- Status updates fail — inventory never syncs
- The bot appears stuck in an infinite replan/timeout loop (218 actions queued, all timing out)

## Files
- `MineflayerAdapter/index.js` — place action dispatch, event sending
- `Agent.World.Minecraft/WebSocketBridge.cs` — event deserialization

## Validation
- Run agent with creative mode inventory
- Say "place a dirt block"
- Verify action completes and dirt appears in world
- Verify no TIMED OUT warnings in agent log

comments.author: anonymous
comments.body:
**Fix implemented (Sprint 56 Wave A):**

**Part 1 — Adapter (`index.js`):** Reset `_stopRequested = false` at the start of the `case 'place'` handler. Previously only `mine` and `wander` did this. A stale stop flag from a prior emergency stop would cause `bot.pathfinder.goto()` to throw "The goal was changed before it could be completed!" for subsequent place actions.

**Part 2 — C# (`AgentBackgroundService.cs`):** `ActionCompletedEvent` handler now calls `CompleteCorrelatedActionById`/`CompleteCorrelatedActionByTool`. Previously it only logged. This is a safety net — most actions already complete via domain events (`blockPlaced`, `moveComplete`, etc.), but adding completion here prevents 30s timeouts when domain events are delayed/lost. Also fixes `chat` actions which only send `actionCompleted` (no domain event). Idempotent — `CompleteCorrelatedActionByTool` only transitions `Dispatched→Completed`.

**Files:** `MineflayerAdapter/index.js`, `WebUI.Blazor/AgentBackgroundService.cs`
**Build:** ✅ C# build succeeds; JS module loads without syntax errors.
**Validation needed:** Live test — verify place actions complete without TIMED OUT warnings.

comments.author: anonymous
comments.body:
**ROOT CAUSE FOUND (commit cd60bbe):**

The place timeout was **5 seconds** (`["place"] = 5` in ToolTimeoutOverrides, set in Sprint 43 P1-4). This is far too short:

- Pathfinding alone takes 2-5 seconds per block
- The adapter processes actions sequentially through a command queue
- The full round-trip (dispatch → navigate → equip → place → BlockPlacedEvent → C#) needs 5-15 seconds
- When 8 concurrent place actions are dispatched, the adapter queues them — later actions wait for earlier ones to complete, pushing total time well past 5s

**Fix:** Increased place timeout from 5s → 15s.

**Also added:** StatusEvent diagnostic logging (`[status] received: gameMode=... creative=... inventoryItems=...`) so future runs can confirm whether game mode detection is working.

**Note on game mode:** The world appears to be in survival mode (not creative). The decompose correctly chose the survival path (Wander → MineBlock → CraftItem → place). If the user intended creative mode, the game mode needs to be changed in the Minecraft world/server settings.
